title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Q2 2025 Results: Revenue Up 9%, Raises Full-Year Guidance
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Q2 2025 Results and Guidance Update. Q2 2025 Financial Results: Acadia reported total revenues of $264.6 million, representing 9% year-over-year growth. Earnings per share of $0.16, though 20% lower than prior year. Product Performance: DAYBUE (Rett syndrome treatment): $96.1 million in sales, up 14% year-over-year. NUPLAZID (Parkinson's disease psychosis): $168.5 million in sales, up 7% year-over-year. Balance Sheet: Strong balance sheet with $762 million in cash and investments. Raised Full-Year Guidance: Management increased 2025 full-year guidance. Total Revenue: Raised to $1.045–$1.095 billion. NUPLAZID Sales: Increased to $665–$690 million. Annual sales expected to exceed $1 billion in 2025, positioning Acadia as an expanding mid-cap biopharmaceutical company.
